title: deparia omeiensis
intro: Deparia omeiensis, also known as Omei maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Deparia in the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in East Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Deparia omeiensis include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
